name: DRINK & PLAY - SUMMER PRIDE EDITION !
description:
**Curious Creature Productions are back to entertain you once more. To celebrate Pride Month and our 4th birthday we invite you to DRINK & PLAY : SUMMER PRIDE EDITION!**

Indulge yourself with our generous apéro, while enjoying staged readings of five brand-new short plays.

'Summer Lovin', 'The Lube Job', 'Project D.I.L.F', 'The Talk' & 'Bait & Switch'.

Written and Directed by Jimi Dhalluin-Goninan.

Starring Alice Griffin, Julie Kalya, Margeaux Lampley, Ford Leland, Dimitri Michelsen, Tom Morton , Darcy Ruscio, & Iris Selmpesi

🎟️ [**TICKETS**](https://subdomain-159945.placeminute.com/) 🎫

Entry 15€ (includes show & refreshments)

 Presale tickets are available at [https://subdomain-159945.placeminute.com/](https://subdomain-159945.placeminute.com/ "https://subdomain-159945.placeminute.com/").

Limited tickets can be purchased at the door, but due to popular demand you're advised to reserve your spot at curiouscreatureboxoffice@gmail.com
